name: jellyfin
title: Jellyfin Media Server
description: Jellyfin open-source media server for streaming movies, TV shows, and music

variables.name: HOST_PORT
variables.label: Web UI Port
variables.description: Port exposed on the host for the Jellyfin web interface

variables.name: MEDIA_PATH
variables.label: Media Path
variables.description: Host path to your media library (movies, TV shows, music)

variables.name: CONFIG_PATH
variables.label: Config Path
variables.description: Host path for Jellyfin configuration and metadata
